# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0
> Ships with [SkiaSharp 3.0.0](../3.0.0.md) · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/HarfBuzzSharp/8.3.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.0.0)
> **API changes** · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](8.3.0/index.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 ships 6 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Modernize the repository and prepare SkiaSharp 3.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2505](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2505))
- **Harfbuzz to 7.3.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582))

## API Surface

- **Run APIScan after packaging on the packages** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2730))

## Bug Fixes

- **All [Obsolete] members and types** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539))
- **Function pointers and LibraryImport** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917))
- **.NET to 8.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927))
- **SDK, workloads and projects** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971))
